title: Handling stolen goods as defined in s22 Theft Act 1968
summary: 9084 Criminal — receiving, arranging, assisting disposal knowing or believing goods stolen.
learningObjectives: Define handling under s22 and s24 TA 1968.
Analyse types of handling: receiving, undertaking, assisting.
Apply cases: R v Grainge, R v Park.

simpleExplanation.title: Dealing in stolen property
simpleExplanation.summary: Handling covers receiving stolen goods or helping dispose of them — D must know or believe they are stolen at the time of handling.
steps: Goods must be stolen (s24 — recent theft assumed).
Handling — any s22(1) act while goods remain stolen.
Alternative charge if theft cannot be proved.

sections.content: **Handling s22** (2.2.5) — check **goods still stolen** and **subjective belief**.

sections.label: Mark a handling stolen goods question
